name: Russian Potato and Mushroom Croquettes
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes in water until tender.
2. Drain the potatoes and mash them.
3. In a separate pan, sauté onions and mushrooms in oil and water over medium-high heat for three minutes.
4. Mix mashed potatoes, sautéed onions and mushrooms, seasonings, and matzo meal together in a large bowl.
5. Form 10 croquettes.
6. Heat oil in a large non-stick frying pan over medium-high heat.
7. Fry the croquettes for eight minutes on each side.
8. Serving size is 2 croquettes per person.
